name: atlas-blob-compute-smoke-d3tricubic
description: E5 Phase 7e — D3 tricubic firing in the compute path. tricubicEnabled is a SCENE-LEVEL toggle (DisplayState.render.tricubicEnabled, NOT in computeMarchToggles) — it controls atlas-uniform `tricubicEnabled` which the SHARED atlas helpers read. Both fragment + compute pipelines see the same uniform, so flipping it on makes the compute path use 64-tap Catmull-Rom evaluation in `sampleAtomAtlasCascade` instead of 8-tap trilinear. ~8x texture fetch increase per sceneSDF call. Currently expected to crash on iGPU; parked as regression gate for stronger hardware. Same scene as default smoke for direct comparison once it's runnable.
